title: teucrium divaricatum var. villosum
intro: Teucrium divaricatum var. villosum, also known as hairy germander, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of hairy germander include its ability to support liver and digestive health, and may also have antimicrobial properties. Hairy germander can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
